name: @isomtop/tyhtml-darwin-x64
description: Native Node.js addon (Rust + napi-rs) that compiles Typst .typ files to HTML and extracts metadata via the <meta> label. Includes prebuilt binaries for Windows x64, Linux x64 (glibc), and macOS (Apple Silicon + Intel).
author: Ling Yu <yulingsc@outlook.com>
